reviews.author: Jitender
reviews.review_body:
My son studies at BLS World School, Greater Noida West, and I can confidently say it’s the best school in Greater Noida West. The school’s excellent infrastructure provides a fantastic environment for learning and growth. Its focus on academic excellence, along with a strong emphasis on sports and extracurricular activities, ensures all-round development for the students. I’ve personally seen my son thrive here, thanks to the dedicated teachers and modern facilities. Highly recommended for any parent looking for the best education for their child!
— Jitender Kumar

reviews.author: ashish gupta
reviews.review_body: Best school in the town with holistic approach for development of a child... The focus on academics and extracurricular activities is too good....

reviews.author: Shweta Singh
reviews.review_body:
BLS is the Best School in Greater Noida West.
Writing this review after being associated for 2years with the school.

We searched and visited many schools in the area but finalised BLS.
Reason, as a parent we wanted balanced exposure of our kid both in academics as well as in sports, other activities.

After covid the first task was to get the little kids exposed to healthy school environment, which was done perfectly by BLS School Team.

My kid love his school.

You can visit the school and clear all your doubts.
The front desk team is there to guide and help.

reviews.author: Bike & car point by vicky
reviews.review_body: BLS World School is an exceptional school that sets the bar high for quality education. It's dedicated staff, excellent academic programs, commitment to character development, and supportive community make it a truly remarkable place for students to learn and grow.

reviews.author: ROOPAL SAINI
reviews.review_body: One of the best school with almost all the facilities and well trained staff. I definitely recommend this school for the holistic development of a child.

reviews.author: Neha Singh
reviews.review_body: Amazing place with overall development of your child.... you can choose this school without having a second thought about it...
